name: 7-Day Tour: Tangier → Chefchaouen → Fes → Meknes → Volubilis → Sahara → Marrakech

seo.title: 7-Day Tangier to Marrakech Tour — Chefchaouen, Fes, Meknes, Volubilis, Sahara | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 7-day tour from Tangier to Marrakech: all the imperial cities (Chefchaouen, Fes, Meknes), Volubilis (UNESCO), Merzouga desert (Erg Chebbi), Ait Ben Haddou.

hero.tagline: The great north-south tour: imperial cities + Sahara

intro: This 7-day tour is the most complete itinerary departing from Tangier. It includes all the northern imperial cities (Chefchaouen, Fes with an official guide, Meknes, Volubilis) and the Merzouga desert in the south, before crossing the Todra Gorges, Ait Ben Haddou and the Tizi n'Tichka pass to reach Marrakech.
